name: Chengdu CORPRO Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu CORPRO Technology Co., Ltd. provides satellite navigation components and terminals. It offers Beidou satellite navigation application key components, integrated circuits, Beidou satellite navigation terminals, and Beidou satellite navigation and positioning application systems, as well as network security monitoring solutions. The company also provides solutions for photography, security, satellite communications, and other fields; indoor positioning systems; and location-based precision digital service platform. Its products are used in national defense, geology, electric power, transportation, public safety, communications, water conservancy, forestry, and other professional applications. The company was formerly known as Chengdu Gotecom Electronical Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Chengdu CORPRO Technology Co., Ltd. in September 2014. Chengdu CORPRO Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Chengdu, China.
